name: Oat Bran Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup frozen apple juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix the dry ingredients together in a large bowl.
3. In another bowl, mix the wet ingredients thoroughly.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a nonstick baking sheet.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until golden brown.
